name: fifty-shades-of-chicken
description: F.L. Fowler's 'Fifty Shades of Chicken: A Parody in a Cookbook' — 85+ real chicken recipes wrapped in a hilarious Fifty Shades parody, from roast chicken to coq au vin, with proper techniques, brining tips, and weeknight meal solutions.
useCase: Find delicious chicken recipes for any occasion, learn proper cooking techniques, and enjoy a laugh while cooking.
knownRisks: Parody contains mature innuendo — may not be suitable for all readers
Recipes are real but the framing is comedic — some may prefer straightforward cookbooks
Primarily chicken-focused — limited use for other proteins or dietary restrictions
